properties.Name: Fannin South Park & Ride
properties.description:
Address: 1604 West Bellfort St., Houston, TX 77054
Houston region (North, South, East, or West): South
# of covered parking spaces: 0
# of uncovered parking spaces: 1437
Parking fee: Daily Rate – $3.00
Visitors must pay for their space at the Fannin South parking dispenser with exact change only. Visitors will enter their parking spot number (keep receipt). No in-and-out privileges. Light-rail fare must be purchased separately at the METRORail ticket vending machine.

Monthly Contract Hang Tag – $40.00
Available at the Fannin South Service Booth located near the METRORail station entryway. Cash, check or credit cards accepted. In-and-out privileges. Monthly contract parking available – call 713-652-8937.
Light-rail fare must be purchased separately at the METRORail ticket vending machine.

Special Events
During special events, such the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo, no new monthly contracts will be sold. Customers must bring in their old hang tags to purchase a new one. Event rates vary. Includes round-trip METRORail fare (on select events). METRORail fare may be purchased at the ticket vending machine if not included in special event rate.
Bus routes served: 8 West Bellfort
11 Almeda / Lyons
73 Bellfort
87 Sunnyside
311 Bayou Event Shuttle
Rail lines served: Red Line
GPS: 29.6745873, -95.4012779
